Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}Hm...? Oh, it's you. Sorry, I was just thinking about something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I invite them to study[n]for a change of pace...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}You look like you have something to say. Do you need something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Oh, right, exams are coming up soon. Time marches on without a care in the world, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}An invitation to study from {f 4 1} is uncommon. Let's take him up on the offer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}Look at the time. I shouldn't be wasting time sitting around like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}Hm? Do you need something after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}Oh, right, exams are coming up soon. Time marches on without a care in the world, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}An invitation to study from {f 4 1} is uncommon. Let's take him up on the offer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}I see... Well, if you ever need anything, just let us know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Аркана Помірності[n]може зараз допомогти мені поглибити наші стосунки...[n]{f 1 1}
